name: large_memory_with_combinational_for_loop_write
description: Code should include a large memory array (1024+ elements) with indexed writes inside a for-loop within a combinational always block, which triggers exponential memory growth in mem2reg_as_needed_pass2.

name: indexed_memory_write_in_for_loop
description: Code should include an indexed memory write operation using a loop variable inside a for-loop within an always @(*) block, causing excessive memory allocation during mem2reg conversion.

name: memory_with_integer_index_in_combinational_block
description: Code should include a memory array accessed with an integer variable index inside a combinational always block, which causes the mem2reg pass to create excessive intermediate structures.
